context.availability: Reviewed live Theme Intelligence from the published ThemeSnapshot.

decision_theme_signals.qualification_reason: published live ThemeSnapshot; coverage 100% meets the 90% gate; classification is Leading; absolute composite 100.0 meets the documented gate; signal confidence 85 meets the documented gate; concentration is low; data confidence 100 meets the documented gate

decision_theme_signals.disqualification_reason: classification Improving does not meet the Leading gate; absolute composite score is below the documented gate; signal confidence is below the documented gate

context.historical_disclosure: Historical results use the current reviewed constituent basket unless historical membership versions are available.

basket_methodology.eligibility: A session requires consecutive valid adjusted closes and at least 75% member coverage.
basket_methodology.historical_disclosure: Historical results use the current reviewed constituent basket unless historical membership versions are available.
basket_methodology.weighting: Each eligible current-basket member receives equal weight at every eligible daily rebalance.

data_confidence.label: High
data_confidence.reason: 7/7 active members have durable long-history eligibility; basket coverage is 100.0%.
